title: mollia villosa
intro: Mollia villosa, also known as the woolly mollia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mollia villosa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and swelling, and aid in digestion. Mollia villosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots are often used in herbal remedies.
